# Max Tahmasebi

> Tech Lead & Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer in Munich, Germany, with 12+
> years of building and running production software. TypeScript/Node.js, React,
> C#/.NET, PHP/Symfony. German/EU citizen, open to international relocation.
> Contact: mtahmasebi118@gmail.com · https://github.com/maca-sys ·
> https://www.linkedin.com/in/masoudtahmasebi/

This file summarizes the content of https://max-ta.com/ (a single-page
portfolio) for language models and AI agents. The site itself carries the same
information with schema.org Person markup. Also known as Masoud Tahmasebi.

## Current role

Head of Development & Operations at DigitalSpital GmbH, Munich (Jan 2023 –
present). Hands-on Tech Lead for healthcare and mobility platforms: leads the
engineering team (daily dev calls, sprint planning, code reviews, architecture
decisions) while writing production code most of the week. Built a CMS + REST
content API for ADAC in PHP 8.3/Symfony on PostgreSQL, shipped as Docker images
via GitHub Actions to AWS ECR. Maintains CI/CD pipelines deploying
Docker/Kubernetes workloads to Azure, AWS, and Exoscale; operates ~12
production Ubuntu servers with Terraform and Sentry. Built an internal AI agent
connected to Jira and Confluence that turns requests into ready-to-work
tickets. Disaster-recovery plans reduced potential downtime by 40%.

## Earlier experience

- Senior Software Engineer, DigitalSpital GmbH, Munich (2020–2023): cross-platform
  station and fleet-management platforms for ADAC across web, iOS, and Android
  (Angular, Ionic, Capacitor) — reservations, payments, digital signatures,
  payment-terminal integration; Stack Overflow-style internal knowledge platform
  (.NET Core + Angular) for one of Germany's largest companies.
- Senior Full-Stack Engineer, Demis Co., Isfahan (2018–2020): designed AcoreX, a
  modular .NET Core + Angular framework used as the boilerplate for three
  commercial products.
- Technical Development Manager, Timeplicity, Isfahan (2018–2019): took the
  Safetyminder OHS product to launch and +43% profitability.
- Full-Stack Developer, Media Sanat Sepahan, Isfahan (2015–2018): web apps and
  online shops in Node.js and C#.
- Full-Stack Developer, Iras Co., Isfahan (2014–2015): Java EE business
  application still in production today.

## Selected projects

- PIM data-integration platform: Node.js/TypeScript toolset syncing 91,000+
  products from Novomind iPIM into Shopware 6; full catalog in 3–8 minutes at
  ~150 concurrent API requests under ~200 MB memory via disk-streamed JSONL.
- Web accessibility auditing platform: Next.js 15 + Puppeteer + IBM
  accessibility-checker for automated WCAG audits, with AI-assisted analysis,
  multi-page crawling, RBAC, PDF export, and compliance dashboards.
- AI crawler analytics platform: Fastify 5 + TypeScript + Prisma/MySQL API with
  a React dashboard tracking bot crawl activity from Nginx logs, GDPR-compliant.
- Redis production architecture: caching, session, and distributed-locking
  layers across three production instances; zero-data-loss migration fix.
- Live search migration: moved product search to OpenSearch under a hard
  deadline; message-queue workers processed a ~260k-message backlog.
- Commercial Shopware 6 plugins: AI shopping chatbot (OpenAI function calling),
  merchant margin calculator, AI product-feed optimiser.

## Skills

TypeScript, JavaScript, React/Next.js, Angular, Vue/Nuxt, Node.js (Express,
Fastify), C#/.NET, PHP/Symfony, Shopware 6, Java/Spring, React Native/Ionic;
PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Prisma, OpenSearch/Elasticsearch; Docker,
Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS, Azure (AZ-900 certified), GitLab CI, GitHub
Actions, Linux, Sentry; REST API design, distributed systems, event-driven
architectures, OWASP secure coding, GDPR-aware engineering, AI-assisted
development; Agile Scrum/Kanban leadership, mentoring, stakeholder reporting.

## Education

- MSc Software Engineering, University of Isfahan (2015–2017)
- BSc Industrial Engineering, Golpayegan University of Technology (2011–2015)
- Publication: "An efficient model for vehicular cloud computing with
  prioritizing computing resources", Peer-to-Peer Networking and Applications
  (Springer), 2018

## Languages

English (fluent, IELTS 7.5), German (full professional proficiency), Persian
(native).
